system.description: Aloe, also known as burn plant, is a healing herb used to treat burns. A character with Healing proficiency can use 1 lb of aloe in a liniment to treat a patient with acid, cold, electric, or fire damage. The patient is healed 1d3 damage, or up to the amount of acid, cold, electric, or fire damage suffered, whichever is less. A patient cannot be treated with a liniment of aloe more than once per day. Applying the liniment takes 1 turn (10 minutes).
